note: The registry the canon gate reads (automap/story.py). bible.md is the prose twin — the two never disagree.

entities.name: The Order
facts: runs the Lyceum Vaporum
apprentices build the fair rides as coursework

entities.name: Lyceum Vaporum
facts: the school campus; scene to come (docs/explorations/vaporis-lyceum.md)

entities.name: La Foire Vaporum
facts: annual fair on the great lawn west of campus; one week a year (R-003)

entities.name: the great wheel
facts: the fair's landmark, on the raised NE terrace

entities.name: Rector Aurelia Fumans
facts: head of the Order; opens the fair each year

entities.name: Prefect Cassia
facts: senior student on gate duty at the fair; earnest, rulebook-first

entities.name: Magister Brontes
facts: mechanicus of the machine show; gruff, proud of his apprentices

entities.name: Minerva Machinatrix
facts: the Founder; dead — appears in stone and story only (R-004)

entities.name: Carmilla
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Isaac
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Lily
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Alpha
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Bravo
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Caden
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Vec
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Zo
facts: imported — canon owned upstream (R-005)

entities.name: Porter Felix
facts: ticket house at the fair; counts everything twice

entities.name: Vox the Barker
facts: voice of the grand court; promises first, checks later

entities.name: Prisca
facts: sweets stall on the midway

entities.name: Naso
facts: salvage stall on the midway — parts from last year's coursework

entities.name: Druso
facts: wheel operator; nothing turns without his nod

entities.name: Mirella
facts: carousel keeper; sings the ride's count

entities.name: Pippa
facts: a child at the carousel court, always one token short

entities.name: Bassa
facts: food-court cook; feeds apprentices on credit

entities.name: Professor Gaius
facts: off-duty at the food court, grading nothing today

entities.name: Tullo
facts: Brontes' apprentice; the boiler is his graded work

entities.name: Naia
facts: a student who watches the pond instead of the fair

entities.name: Silvo
facts: keeper of the hedge garden and its topiary

entities.name: the bronze valve
facts: three-quarter bore; the wheel's first turn depends on it (arc fair_opening)

entities.name: the Road
facts: the trusted prediction the Gatewrights guide the world along; publicly benevolent guidance

entities.name: the Gatewrights
facts: apply Nudges to keep the world aligned with the Road; the Auregate is their finishing school

entities.name: a Nudge
facts: a Gatewright intervention on a large-scale event to preserve alignment with the Road

entities.name: the Weirgate
facts: the ancient flood-locks above a harvest-fair town; site of the prologue incident (proposed)

entities.name: the Weirgate Release
facts: the prologue's formative incident — a sanctioned Nudge turned catastrophe (proposed; docs/explorations/incident-design.md)
